duplicate_label_rework.description: Repeated label A appears both before and after B.

incomplete_parallel_observed_sequence.description: Only one order of an intended parallel pair is observed; this tests incompleteness sensitivity.

nested_xor_sequence.description: A simple XOR branch inside a sequence.

noise_reversal_sequence.description: Dominant sequence with one rare reversed pair that can be mistaken for concurrency.

overlapping_optional_skips.description: Two optional activities between the same start and end, including the double-skip variant.

parallel_with_optional_branch.description: Concurrent B/C evidence with an optional D after B.

short_loop_required.description: A short loop where relation classifiers tend to mark bidirectional evidence as parallel.
